message:
fix(wal): relax mutability and remove redundant must_use in WalBackendAdapter

finalize_prepared_batch_against_current_state only reads self to compute
checksum transforms and apply them to the prepared batch — it never
mutates adapter state, so &self suffices.  The #[must_use] on
finalized_running_checksum is redundant because Result already carries
that attribute.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
